_comment: Dataset component manifest. VisDrone entries are intentionally 'manual_action_required': the official VisDrone repo distributes only via Google Drive / BaiduYun, and the Drive endpoint returns an HTML interstitial rather than the ZIP. That requirement was documented, not bypassed. No unofficial mirror was substituted.

datasets.notes: 13,022 image-expression pairs over 6,407 unique images; 47,557 object instances. MDETR/COCO JSON.
1,428 pairs over 534 unique images; 4,741 object instances.
3,432 pairs over 1,595 unique images; 12,105 object instances.

datasets.manual_action: Download VisDrone2019-DET (see below), then run scripts/prepare_refdrone.py to build this as a symlink view. RefDrone does NOT redistribute train/val images.
datasets.notes: 8,536 unique images required. Will be symlinks into datasets/visdrone2019_det/, not copies.

datasets.license: CC BY 4.0 / VisDrone terms for the pixels
datasets.notes: 884 MB of base64-encoded TEST images only. Skipped: the same pixels arrive via VisDrone test-dev, and prepare_refdrone.py symlinks them. Download this only if you want the test split without touching VisDrone.

datasets.license: VisDrone challenge terms - academic / non-commercial research. No LICENSE file upstream.
datasets.manual_action: Download in a browser from the official VisDrone repo (https://github.com/VisDrone/VisDrone-Dataset, Task 1). The Google Drive direct endpoint returns an HTML virus-scan interstitial, not the ZIP; this was NOT bypassed. Extract to datasets/visdrone2019_det/train/.
datasets.notes: 1.44 GB, 6,471 images. RefDrone train needs 6,407 of them. REQUIRED.

datasets.license: VisDrone challenge terms - academic / non-commercial research.
datasets.manual_action: Browser download from https://github.com/VisDrone/VisDrone-Dataset (Task 1). Extract to datasets/visdrone2019_det/val/.
datasets.notes: 0.07 GB, 548 images. RefDrone val needs 534 of them. REQUIRED.

datasets.license: VisDrone challenge terms - academic / non-commercial research.
datasets.manual_action: Browser download from https://github.com/VisDrone/VisDrone-Dataset (Task 1). Extract to datasets/visdrone2019_det/test/.
datasets.notes: 0.28 GB, 1,610 images. RefDrone test needs 1,595 of them. REQUIRED. Ground truth is available for test-dev.
NOT NEEDED. Verified against the RefDrone annotations: every referenced image falls in train / val / test-dev. Do not download.

datasets.component: EO sample imagery / drone video for smoke tests
datasets.manual_action: Drop a handful of representative EO stills / short clips here when moving to the inference stage (docs/NEXT_STEPS.md step 2). Grounded-SAM-2 ships local demo assets under third_party/grounded_sam_2/assets/ and notebooks/videos/ if you need something immediately.
datasets.notes: Intentionally empty. Do NOT place proprietary Honeywell / Shield AI / Hivemind footage in this Git repository.

split_derivation.method: Image file_names were extracted from all three RefDrone_*_mdetr.json files and matched against the VisDrone2019-DET split structure. This was measured, not assumed.
split_derivation.result: RefDrone train/val/test are strict subsets of VisDrone2019-DET train/val/test-dev (6,407<=6,471; 534<=548; 1,595<=1,610). test-challenge is not referenced at all.
